commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a pre-provider-normalization quarantine for non-serializable runtime tool schemas in embedded attempts and compaction, plus focused projection/quarantine tests.

PR surface: Source +128, Tests +288. Total +416 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main normalizes active and bundled tools before the existing runtime projection, and the PR's circular-schema tests show the source-level failure path that would throw before session creation.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer compatibility/product acceptance for a protected maintainer-labeled PR, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: fix(agents): quarantine invalid runtime tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary

Pruned the runtime tool-schema quarantine branch down to the assistant-turn failure path.

This adds a pre-normalization quarantine for active runtime tools whose parameter schema cannot be serialized safely before provider normalization. Healthy sibling tools continue into provider normalization, and the existing runtime-compatible projection still filters model/runtime-incompatible schemas before session creation.

Bundled MCP/LSP tools keep allowlist and final effective-tool-policy filtering ahead of quarantine diagnostics, so policy-disabled bundled tools do not produce misleading blocked-tool warnings.

The test fixtures use neutral `fuzzplugin` / `mockplugin` names.

## Verification

- Rebased onto current `origin/main` `77f1359612f`, which includes the upstream lint-suppression baseline fix for `build-artifacts`; current head is `c7bfcafda37`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts` passed on head `c7bfcafda37`: 3 test files, 65 tests, 29.60s including local lock wait.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.test-support.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.test-support.ts` passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed.
- Added-line scrub for private paths, secret-looking strings, and the originally reported fixture name passed.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed before the final clean CI-baseline rebase: run `run_eaaaa66c0e23`, lease `cbx_ff55b428054d` / `crimson-krill`, provider `aws`, command 3m16s, total 5m24s, selected lanes `core` and `coreTests`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` previously exited clean after the bundled-policy fix with no accepted/actionable findings; this pass only rebased the same single commit onto current main.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: A single active tool with a schema that cannot survive provider/runtime schema projection is quarantined before assistant session creation instead of crashing the whole assistant turn.

Real environment tested: Local focused Vitest/format/lint proof through repo wrappers; remote Linux changed gate through AWS Crabbox.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above.

Evidence after fix: Focused runner coverage shows session creation receives only healthy sibling tools when an active tool has an unsupported or non-serializable schema. Projection/quarantine unit coverage verifies provider-repairable schemas are preserved and non-serializable schemas are reported. Bundled-tool coverage verifies policy-disabled bad bundled tools do not emit blocked-tool diagnostics.

Observed result after fix: Healthy tools continue; active bad tools are reported through the existing trusted diagnostic/quarantine path; policy-disabled bundled tools stay quiet.

What was not tested: Live provider calls.


## Refresh 2026-05-31T10:47Z

Rebased onto current `origin/main` and pushed head `c733ce9d86b1`. Verification: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts` passed 2 shards in 19.08s; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check ...` passed; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ...` passed; `git diff --check` and added-line scrub for reported fixture names/private paths/secrets passed.


## Refresh 2026-05-31T11:27Z

Added the sibling compaction-path hardening caught during pre-land autoreview: compaction now applies the same pre-normalization quarantine to core and bundled tools before provider/runtime schema normalization, so unserializable schemas cannot crash compaction before the existing runtime projection quarantine runs.

Verification on refreshed head `a9013c0054dd`:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts`: passed 2 shards / 131 tests in 19.68s after the latest rebase
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check ...`: passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ...`: passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings after the compaction fix
- `git diff --check` and added-line scrub for reported fixture names/private paths/secrets: clean
- Azure Crabbox attempt `run_308cf0b5f63b` / `blue-crayfish` timed out waiting for a coordinator lease after 10m; cleanup confirmed the late lease id was not present
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: passed on `run_438d67e3a858`, lease `cbx_97c5a2c540d7` / `blue-lobster`, provider=aws, command 8m26s, total 10m47s, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, lease stopped=true

Live GitHub state after the refresh: mergeable, `mergeStateStatus=CLEAN`, active checks 0, actionable failed checks 0. The remaining cancelled rollup entries are historical `auto-response` / `Real behavior proof` runs from superseded check attempts.
